name: Apple Sponge Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core, and slice the apples.
2. Melt butter in a deep, 9-inch round cake pan. Add brown sugar and stir until well combined.
3. Arrange the apple slices on top of the butter mixture and sprinkle with lemon juice and zest.
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg yolks and sugar until light and pale yellow.
5. Mix water and vanilla extract into a small amount of batter.
6. In another bowl, combine flour, salt, and baking powder. Add to the egg yolk mixture alternately with vanilla mixture, folding gently each time.
7. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the batter.
8. Pour the batter over the apple slices in the pan.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 50 minutes. Serve hot or lukewarm; it is best not to remove the pudding from the pan after baking.
